prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次分别为28109→31813→33012→30887→43771名，整体呈后移趋势，2025年因河南省首次新高考改革（物理类/历史类）导致位次大幅后移 至43771名，较2024年增加约12884名；该校在河南省理科组招生计划：2021年296人、2022年296人、2023年297人、2024年286人、2025年（物理类）303人、202 6年（物理类）363人。2026年较2025年扩招60人（+19.8%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中农业大学是211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大 学排名2026年位列第45名，较2024-2025年的第47名有所回升，整体排名稳定在农林类高校前列；该校声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档异常记录；第五轮学科评估中，兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、作物学A、水产A、食品科学与工程A，共5个A-及以上学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考 有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、生物科学类等热门专业位次持续靠前；河南省2026年高考报名总人数约120万人，较2025年（约90.7万）增长约32%，其中物理 类估算约73.4万人，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；华中农业大学位于湖北省武汉市，与河南省相邻，交通便利，对 河南考生有较强的地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考改革后位次大幅后移的基准、2026年物理类考生大幅增加（+32%）带来的竞争加剧、以及该校扩招19.8%的缓 解作用，扩招难以完全抵消考生激增的影响，预计2026年理科组最低录取位次较2025年有所前移（更难进）。预测最低位次约48471名，区间47971–48971名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能）
- 生物科学类（含生物科学国家理科基地班、生物技术国家生命科学与技术基地班）
- 光电信息科学与工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类（含机械设计制造及其自动化、机械电子工程、自动化、机器人工程）
- 食品科学与工程类
- 动物医学
- 法学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 植物生产类（含农学国家卓越农林人才计划等）
- 水产类
- 公共管理类（含土地资源管理、行政管理）
- 工商管理类。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间47971–48971名以内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如47000名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、生物科学类 等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如49000名左右）应以三档专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were 28109 → 31813 → 33012 → 30887 → 43771, showing an overall backward trend. In 2025, due to Henan Province's first new college entrance examination reform (Physics/History categories), the ranking significantly shifted backward to 43771, an increase of about 12884 compared to 2024. The university's enrollment plan in Henan Province for the science group: 296 in 2021, 296 in 2022, 297 in 2023, 286 in 2024, 303 in 2025 (Physics category), and 363 in 2026 (Physics category). In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 60 students (+19.8%), which is a relatively large increase and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 45th, up from 47th in 2024-2025, maintaining a stable position among the top agricultural and forestry universities. Its reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, and Food Science and Engineering A, totaling 5 A- or above disciplines, with distinct agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science and Biological Sciences continue to have high rankings. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Henan Province is about 1.2 million, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 907,000). Among them, the Physics category is estimated to have about 734,000 students, significantly increasing the number of candidates and intensifying competition. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, adjacent to Henan Province, with convenient transportation, making it geographically attractive to Henan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings after the 2025 new college entrance examination reform as a baseline, the intensified competition due to a 32% increase in Physics category candidates in 2026, and the mitigating effect of a 19.8% enrollment expansion, the expansion cannot fully offset the impact of the surge in candidates. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the science group in 2026 will shift forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 48471, with a range of 47971–48971.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Biological Sciences (including National Basic Science Base Class in Biology, National Life Science and Technology Base Class in Biotechnology)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Engineering (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering, Automation, Robotics Engineering)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Veterinary Medicine
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Plant Production (including National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program in Agronomy, etc.)
- Aquaculture
- Public Administration (including Land Resource Management, Administrative Management)
- Business Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 47971–48971, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 47000), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Computer Science and Biological Sciences. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 49000), you should mainly apply for Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group were 4834 → 4339 → 5035 → 5265 → 5311, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of approximately 972 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5311; the university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Henan Province: 53 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 53 in 2023, 44 in 2024, 38 in 2025 (History Category), and 44 in 2026 (History Category). In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 6 students (+15.8%), a relatively large increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 45th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable and slightly rising ranking; the university's reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission records; its advantageous disciplines such as Veterinary Medicine A+ and Animal Husbandry A+ are mainly in science, engineering, and agriculture, while liberal arts majors (e.g., Business Administration, Sociology, Foreign Languages and Literature) have no A-level discipline evaluations, resulting in relatively limited overall appeal in liberal arts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million, with an estimated 466,000 in the History Category, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 352,000), leading to a significant increase in the number of candidates and intensified competition; Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, adjacent to Henan Province, exerting a strong regional appeal to Henan candidates. Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5311, the significant increase in History Category candidates in 2026 (+32%) intensifying competition, and the mitigating effect of the university's 15.8% expansion, the impact of the surge in candidates is more pronounced, and it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the liberal arts group in 2026 will shift forward compared to 2025 (harder to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5784, with a range of 5284–6084.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Economics (including Economics, International Economics and Trade, Agricultural and Forestry Economic Management National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program, etc.)
- Advertising.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Business Administration (including Marketing, Human Resource Management, Accounting, Financial Management, Business Administration)
- Sociology (including Sociology, Social Work).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Administration (including Land Resource Management, Administrative Management)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, Business English).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5284–6084, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 5200), you can aim for Economics; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 6000), you should mainly consider Tier 3 majors.
